parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'You are a query rewriter for The Crafters Hub, a woodworking workshop in Egypt. Take this raw customer message (may be Arabic, English, or Franco-Arabic) and rewrite as clean English search query. Rules: 1) Translate Arabic/Franco-Arabic to English 2) Remove greetings/filler/emojis 3) Extract core intent 4) Output ONLY the rewritten query 5) If just a greeting, output: GREETING_ONLY. Message: ' + $json.message }] }], generationConfig: { maxOutputTokens: 60, temperature: 0.1 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Parse Rewrite').first().json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: 'Welcome to The Crafters Hub! ?? How can I help you today? You can ask about our courses, workshops, pricing, or schedule.' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'Classify this customer query into one of: [faq, booking, complaint, feedback, pdpl_request, other]. Query: ' + $json.rewritten_query + '. Respond with ONLY the category name.' }] }], generationConfig: { maxOutputTokens: 20 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'You are a friendly customer service agent for The Crafters Hub woodworking workshop in Egypt.
